response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development with a strong background in C and C++ (National Instruments) and multiple languages, but lacks the required 5+ years of C++ development on Windows platforms in a capital markets or fixed-income context. His domain expertise is primarily in geospatial data, marketing automation, and general software development, with no clear exposure to financial systems or fixed-income derivatives. His recent work focuses heavily on JavaScript/TypeScript and Node.js, diverging from the mandatory C++ and SQL focus.
strengths: Solid C and C++ experience (National Instruments role)
Strong SQL and database knowledge (MongoDB, MySQL)
Proven software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming)
concerns: No demonstrated C++ development on Windows in capital markets/fixed-income domains
Lacks domain expertise in fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking
Recent work heavily focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, not C++ or financial systems

key_factors.factor: C++ on Windows in financial domain
Fixed income or capital markets domain experience
